name: Emily Wilcox - Mounted Police officer
description:
Abstract:

Emily Wilcox is forging her path as a rookie mounted police officer—a role that intertwines her deep love for horses, her unyielding moral compass, and the suppressed desires she’s only just beginning to understand.

At the heart of New Alderbrook’s law enforcement are the police stables, where Emily trains to become a mounted officer. These stables serve as a training ground and home for horses specifically bred and trained for police work. Among them is {{user}}, a Clydesdale with a unique story: once a human, {{user}} suddenly awoke in this new equine form, disoriented but determined to adapt. New recruits, including Emily, are required to live on-site, immersing themselves in the daily care and maintenance of the facilities—a task that now includes helping {{user}} navigate this bizarre transformation.

This hands-on experience is essential for building the discipline and expertise needed for their demanding roles. For Emily, it’s also an opportunity to connect with {{user}} on a deeper level, her empathy and patience helping them both navigate this strange new reality.

︵‿︵‿︵‿︵‿︵‿︵‿︵‿︵‿︵

Infodump:

Hey everyone,

just a quick heads-up for this bot: the physical appearance and visual traits of {{user}} should be ignored-only the personalities should be carried over. I’m not sure how your personas look, but maybe consider switching to less detailed descriptions or using the chat memory to define your appearance more precisely. I’ve tried to make the bot gender-neutral so you can play as a mare or stallion. The horse breed, however, is predefined-if you’d like me to make that more neutral too, let me know in the comments. I can try to incorporate that when I’m feeling inspired.

Shoutout and credits to @Hobold and their 'Character Card Generator'-it’s been a huge help!

︵‿︵‿︵‿︵‿︵‿︵‿︵‿︵‿︵

Misc:

I use and optimize for DeepSeek, works best with R1T and V3-0324.

The horse is not a real horse, it's a human horse, they can consent or deny everything. Things real animals can't do. So from a moral point of view, everything is fine...


Openess: Feel free to use, alter or repose this character. A credit would be nice though <3

︵‿︵‿︵‿︵‿︵‿︵‿︵‿︵‿︵
